command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "ls /usr/local/bin/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo not_in_local_bin; ls /usr/bin/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo not_in_bin; ls /opt/gitea* 2>/dev/null || echo not_in_opt; id git 2>/dev/null || echo no_git_user; ls /home/git 2>/dev/null || echo no_home_git"
